products.title: KONG Classic Dog Toy
products.description: The gold standard of dog toys. Stuff with treats for hours of mentally stimulating play. Ultra-durable natural rubber for power chewers.

products.title: Furminator Undercoat Deshedding Tool
products.description: Reduces loose hair from shedding up to 90%. Stainless steel edge reaches through topcoat to safely remove undercoat hair.

products.title: PetSafe Easy Walk No-Pull Dog Harness
products.description: Gently discourages pulling with front-chest leash attachment. Comfortable padded straps and quick-snap buckles.

products.title: Outward Hound Fun Feeder Slow Bowl
products.description: Maze-like ridges slow eating up to 10x. Helps reduce bloat and regurgitation. Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

products.title: ChuckIt! Ultra Ball Dog Toy
products.description: High-bounce rubber for exciting fetch games. Durable and buoyant for water and land play. Bright colors for easy visibility.

products.title: Milk-Bone Original Dog Biscuits
products.description: Classic dog treat made with real bone marrow. Helps clean teeth and freshen breath. Fortified with vitamins and minerals.

products.title: Wellness CORE Natural Grain Free Dry Dog Food
products.description: High-protein formula with premium turkey and chicken. Grain-free recipe ideal for sensitive stomachs. Rich in omega fatty acids.

products.title: Benebone Real Flavor Wishbone Dog Chew Toy
products.description: Made in USA with real bacon flavor. Ergonomic wishbone shape for easy gripping. Super durable nylon for power chewers.

products.title: Best Pet Supplies Voyager Step-In Air Dog Harness
products.description: Breathable mesh design keeps dogs cool. Easy step-in design with velcro and quick-release buckle. Reflective trim for safety.

products.title: IRIS USA Airtight Pet Food Storage Container
products.description: Airtight seal locks in freshness and keeps pests out. Clear BPA-free plastic. Holds up to 33 lbs of dog food.

products.title: iFetch Interactive Ball Launcher for Dogs
products.description: Automatically launches mini tennis balls for independent fetch play. Adjustable launch distance. Dogs can reload balls themselves.

products.title: Zesty Paws Multifunctional Supplement Bites
products.description: 8-in-1 multivitamin with glucosamine, probiotics, and omega fatty acids. Supports hip, joint, skin, coat, and immune health.
